message.content:
Review the "Event Horizon: Proximity-Based Docking in Rocket Mode" feature across these 5 files for bugs. This is review pass 13. Previous passes found and fixed 25 bugs. Only report NEW bugs with genuine functional impact at confidence >= 85%. Lower confidence findings should NOT be reported.

Files:
1. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\hooks\useRocketMode.js`
2. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\RocketLayer.jsx`
3. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\RocketHUD.jsx`
4. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\Universe.jsx`
5. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\Universe.module.css`

Previously fixed (DO NOT re-report): Memory leak, double rAF, callback overwrite, zero stageSize, infinite rAF, infinite redirect, star position, stale callback exit, stale dockState, sessionStorage throws, asymmetric stageSize, auto-dock null after restore, null after ENTER dock, can't dock in magnet, warp timing, flash Phase 2, inconsistent RNG, unstable ref, restore timeout cleanup, explore timeout cleanup, surprise auto-dock cooldown, missing cooldown magnet→approaching, blanket preventDefault, stale stageSize in timeout, magnet drift disengage cooldown.

If no bugs found at >=85% confidence, say "NO BUGS FOUND".

content.text: I'll read all 5 files in parallel to conduct a thorough review.
